problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Combining Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
